rows.what_html: Approval milestone — celebrating the contract, not building the hunt
Inbox silence — no eBuy alerts, no SAM.gov watchlist, waiting
Pipeline activated — eBuy SIN alerts, sources sought watchlist, agency forecasts

template_data.closer: THE CONTRACT OPENS DOORS. YOU STILL HAVE TO KNOCK.

image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Left side: illustrated professional in business casual at desk, laptop open showing empty inbox with zero notifications. Right side: timeline with 3 icons labeled with 1-2 words each: 'APPROVED,' 'WAITING,' 'ACTIVATED.' Bold headline top: 'APPROVED DOESN'T MEAN PIPELINE READY.' One highlighted callout box with short 3-4 word phrase: 'Hunt. Don't Wait.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
